title: An Act clarifying the operation of the Franklin Regional Council of Governments

abstracts.abstract: By Ms. Comerford, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 3055) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Joanne M. Comerford, Susannah M. Whipps and Paul W. Mark for legislation to clarify the operation of the Franklin Regional Council of Governments.  Municipalities and Regional Government.
